addressBook.title: Address Book
addressBook.emptyDescription:
You haven't added any addresses yet. Start by adding one to your address book.
To begin, press the {action} button and save your contacts for faster checkout.
addressBook.billingDescription: Address associated with your payment method, typically where your credit card or bank statements are sent.
addressBook.dropDescription: Ship orders straight to your customer while we take care of making, packing, and delivering them for you.
addressBook.editAddressTypeNote: Address type can't be changed to maintain data integrity and ensure smooth order processing.
addressBook.defaultToggleShipping: Save as my default shipping address
addressBook.defaultToggleBilling: Save as my default billing address
addressBook.defaultToggleDrop: Save as my default drop shipping address
addressBook.defaultTooltipShippingText: Choose this option to automatically use this address as your default shipping address for future purchases.
addressBook.defaultTooltipBillingText: Choose this option to automatically use this address as your billing address for payments and invoices in future orders.
addressBook.defaultTooltipDropText: Choose this option to automatically use this details when fulfilling orders through drop shipping.
addressBook.confirmDefaultChangeTitleDrop: Confirm Default Drop Shipping Address Change
addressBook.confirmDefaultChangeDescription: You're about to set this as your default {type}. Confirm to proceed.
addressBook.deleteConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this address?
addressBook.deleteConfirmDescription: This address will be permanently removed from your address book.
addressBook.selectNewDefaultShippingDescription: Your default shipping address has been removed. Please select a new one now, or update it later.
addressBook.selectNewDefaultTitleDrop: Select New Default Drop Shipping Address
addressBook.selectNewDefaultDescriptionShipping: Your default shipping address has been removed. Please select a new one now, or update it later.
addressBook.selectNewDefaultDescriptionBilling: Your default billing address has been deleted. Please select a new default address now, or you can choose one later.
addressBook.selectNewDefaultDescriptionDrop: Your default drop shipping address has been deleted. Please select a new default address now, or you can choose one later.
